533 R1B R1B_ASMT_PART_FAM (R1B) Family Participation in Assessment CHAR 1 Assessment/discharge information: participation in assessment - family. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, 2 = No Family, "-" = Unknown.
534 R1C R1C_ASMT_PART_SIGO (R1C) Significant Other Participation in Assessment CHAR 1 Assessment/discharge information: participation in assessment - significant other. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, 2 = None, "-" = Unknown.
